import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  while idx < 2
    while i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = i - 0
        i = i + 0
        idx = idx
        i = i
        idx = idx
        i = i
        idx = idx
        i = i
        i = n + n
      end
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut started = false
    mut done = false
    while i < n and not done
      let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        started = true
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    end
    if idx == 0
      nums = [val, 0]
    else
      nums = [nums[0], val]
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  mut a = nums[0]
  mut b = nums[1]
  while b != 0
    let t = a % b
    a = b
    b = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{a}")
  Ok(())
end
